case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,180.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY
